title: LifeSMP Crafting Recipes
description: All the added/altered crafting recipes used in Grian's Life series!
body:
Adds four recipes (further shown in gallery);
- **TNT**; 4 paper, 4 sand, 1 gunpowder.
- **Nametag**; 1 paper, 1 string.
- **Saddle**; 3 leather.
- **Moss**; 1 bonemeal, 1 wheat seed.
